textByHash.c11b399d5350e14e0d369206a28944a7203bdb6c: Welcome to the Alchemical Society. What can I help you with?
textByHash.c1ac13bee5b814139f4e35311fdf7e4f0d616794: This is the main facility of the Alchemical Society. We're an organisation who fuse the forgotten teachings of the Old Ones with traditional Gielinorian Herblore practices.
textByHash.9d209086af320f1cf055415490f704ae92c26def: The lab under our feet allows us to fund our research by producing useful products for the kingdom.
textByHash.d076ccf3eee6cd47b46a65287c5e4b1de682d277: In a way, but we very much respect Herblore as a profession and recognise that whatever your druids do definitely works. Our goal is to advance the study of Herblore, not replace it.
textByHash.698d9bf6d4b70f24cda5b492c3cc5653b8048447: Anyway, I'm a little busy at the moment, but I'm sure some of the other lab assistants would love to tell you more!
textByHash.fb82c1a3e552a27b9c8ef784cd1cc66644323492: When I'm not working in the lab, I'm normally somewhere around here researching or administrating our orders. There's an awful lot of paperwork to get through!
textByHash.dcdd68a5cb382a6ae2782d01294eb02a2ef7cb10: We're not really a shop, so our products are not available to buy directly. Everything we make gets shipped wholesale around the kingdom.
textByHash.9682cd5e75c3885d53d316eb724e8b8efb979059: You look like the adventuring type anyway. I can't imagine our products would be of much use to you.
textByHash.8df2b3f056ab0f7ca695529d6919e70d48a9ca35: Hey! Where do you think you're going?
textByHash.4e31d2dda2f5a10b8fabe14b96c2aa3629f64e23: We are the Alchemical Society and those stairs lead to our lab and production facilities.
textByHash.8aad5cf4cd368bedde3bc10a4b1c759debb1a727: You are? Well, we're always looking for new members, provided they have the aptitude needed. In that case, head on in and talk to Supervisor Lalo. He'll show you how everything works.
